content.text:
*holds that for a moment*

I think... it would mean I'm not a good sister. Or not a good person, maybe. 

I'm usually the one people come to. In my family, that's just... that's my role, I guess. My sister needs more support, she always has, and I've always been the one who -- 

*pauses*

I think if I said "I can't do this right now," it would mean I was abandoning her. Which sounds dramatic when I say it out loud, but that's what it feels like underneath.
